name: Saxony (Germany)

colors.symbolism: the historic Wettin colours, recalling the silver of Saxony

description: Two equal horizontal stripes of white over green.
history: Adopted as the civil flag of the Free State of Saxony in 1991 after German reunification, restoring the white-and-green of the historic Kingdom of Saxony (1815-1918) and the inter-war Free State; the colours were originally the livery colours of the House of Wettin.

features.symbolism: White over green are the colours of the Wettin dynasty, who ruled Saxony from the 11th century.
